heading: Prerequisites
body:
- An Azure (Microsoft Azure) account with an active subscription.

- An Azure (Microsoft Azure) compute service to connect to Atlas. To learn what Azure (Microsoft Azure) services
  the Azure (Microsoft Azure) Service Connector supports, see the Azure (Microsoft Azure)
  [documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/service-connector/overview#what-services-are-supported-by-service-connector).

- An existing Atlas cluster.

- A database user with the necessary permissions to access your Atlas cluster.

  > **Important:** Azure (Microsoft Azure) Service Connector for Atlas
  > currently only supports [SCRAM](manual/core/security-scram) authentication.
  > To learn more, see [Configure Database Users](add-mongodb-users).

- Your Atlas cluster's connection string.
